title: FNP-Zo-Metric
body:
**FNP-Zo-Metric turns every weapon sprite into stylized 3D model, taking inspiration from Flintl0ck, but also adding it's own little things to keep the resource pack interesting.**

This resource pack contains remake of every weapon's model, including early game, mid game, late game and even unavailable cultists' weapons!

**Little author's note:**

This pack is an FNP (almost)6 thousand downloads special, made as a token of gratitude to all the people that enjoyed this mod! While author does think that 2D sprites are still cool none-the-less, FNP-Zo-Metric made him slightly change his mind :D
